title: 函館スプリントSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: A long race is on the horizon...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
To me, 3,600 meters is a formidable distance...
No matter how much I run, there is still more to
go.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: However, I must face it head-on.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So that I may become an example to everyone, as
class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
First up is this starting 1,200 meters. I'll blaze
right through it!
